generated_oml:
// ====================== Physical Twin Entity ======================
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity running on the onboard NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano"
]

// ====================== Digital Twin Entity ======================
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity executed on external compute resources"
]

// ====================== User Entity ======================
instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity providing remote UI for monitoring and control"
]

// ====================== Digital Twin (for component containment) ======================
instance DigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital Twin instance required for DTComponent containment"
]

// ====================== Services ======================
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time UI visualisation of speed, steering, object tracks and projected path",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeSpeedSteeringInsight, PredictedPathInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC algorithm runs remotely in the DT and returns speed set‑points",
    DTDFVocab:provides SpeedSetpointInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI controls to enable/disable ACC, set speed, and trigger emergency braking",
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustACCParametersAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of time‑series reports stored in a SQL database",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalReportInsight, ObjectTrackHistoryInsight
]

instance Visualization3DService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3‑D visualisation of the vehicle and its environment",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTime3DViewInsight
]

// ====================== Insights ======================
instance RealTimeSpeedSteeringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live display of vehicle speed and steering angle for operator awareness"
]

instance PredictedPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected vehicle path based on current dynamics and ACC set‑points"
]

instance SpeedSetpointInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Speed set‑point generated by the ACC controller and sent to the motor drive"
]

instance RealTime3DViewInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3‑D view of the vehicle and surrounding obstacles"
]

instance HistoricalReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Aggregated historical performance reports for post‑mission analysis"
]

instance ObjectTrackHistoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Chronological history of detected object tracks for situational assessment"
]

// ====================== Actions ======================
instance AdjustACCParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator‑initiated adjustment of ACC target speed or following distance",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Immediate braking command issued automatically or by operator",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// ====================== Enablers (Functional Entities) ======================
instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS 2‑based data translation FE handling serialization, unit conversion and Wi‑Fi transport",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "FE that runs DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filter to produce object tracks",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ComputationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "FE executing the ACC controller and providing speed set‑points",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance VisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "FE rendering a real‑time 3‑D view for the UI",
    DTDFVocab:enables Visualization3DService
]

instance ControlPanelFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "FE exposing UI controls to enable/disable ACC, set target speed, and trigger emergency brake",
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ReportingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "FE generating time‑series reports and persisting them in a SQL database",
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

instance MotorControlFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "FE forwarding brake and speed commands to the motor drive actuator",
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

// ====================== Data Transmitted ======================
instance LiDARPointCloudTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLidarSensor
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseDepthCamera
]

instance SpeedTelemetryTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringTelemetryTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

// ====================== Sensing Components ======================
// LiDAR Sensor
instance HokuyoLidarSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST‑10LX 2‑D LiDAR providing raw point‑cloud data on the Physical Twin",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
]

// Depth Camera Sensor
instance IntelRealSenseDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera delivering depth images to the Physical Twin",
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

// Vehicle Speed Sensor (feedback from motor/ESC)
instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed feedback derived from the motor/ESC on the Physical Twin",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedTelemetryTransmitted
]

// Steering Angle Sensor (servo encoder)
instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering‑angle feedback from the servo encoder on the Physical Twin",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringTelemetryTransmitted
]

// ====================== Data Instances ======================
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point‑cloud stream transmitted to the Digital Twin",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth images from the RealSense camera streamed to the Digital Twin",
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
]

instance VehicleSpeedTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed telemetry used for ACC computation",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedTelemetryTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationFE
]

instance SteeringAngleTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering‑angle telemetry used for path prediction",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringTelemetryTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationFE
]

instance ObjectTrackTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of object tracks generated by clustering and Kalman filter",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationFE
]

instance SQLReportData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical reports persisted in a SQL database",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedTelemetryTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingFE
]

// ====================== Acting Components ======================
instance MotorDriveActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder ESC motor drive receiving voltage commands for speed control and emergency braking"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo receiving angle commands to steer the vehicle"
]

// ====================== Models ======================
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering model applied to LiDAR point clouds for object detection",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE,
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman‑filter tracking module producing object track time series",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE,
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance ACCControllerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622‑class I ACC controller implementing speed‑set‑point logic",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationFE,
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance Rendering3DModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3‑D rendering model used for real‑time visualisation of vehicle and environment",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationFE,
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

// ====================== Environment ======================
instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity,
                DigitalTwinEntity,
                UserEntity,
                HokuyoLidarSensor,
                IntelRealSenseDepthCamera,
                VehicleSpeedSensor,
                SteeringAngleSensor,
                MotorDriveActuator,
                SteeringServoActuator,
                DataTranslationFE,
                DataCollectionFE,
                ComputationFE,
                VisualizationFE,
                ControlPanelFE,
                ReportingFE,
                MotorControlFE,
                DataMonitoringService,
                ComputationOffloadingService,
                RemoteManagementService,
                ReportingService,
                Visualization3DService,
                RealTimeSpeedSteeringInsight,
                PredictedPathInsight,
                SpeedSetpointInsight,
                RealTime3DViewInsight,
                HistoricalReportInsight,
                ObjectTrackHistoryInsight,
                AdjustACCParametersAction,
                EmergencyBrakeAction,
                DigitalTwin
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin sends computed ACC commands (desired speed) back to the vehicle for actuation, as well as remote‑management commands (enable/disable ACC, modify desired speed, emergency brake) issued by the User Interface FE. These commands are translated by the Data Translation FE and delivered over the Wi‑Fi link to the Physical Twin Entity's Actuation FE."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates in real‑time with a maximum end‑to‑end network latency of 100 ms (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and clocks synchronised to ≤100 ms accuracy, satisfying the timing requirements of ACC computation offloading and remote management."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The constellation consists of the Physical Twin Entity (sensors, actuators, and data‑pre‑processing FE), the Digital Twin Entity (data collection, ACC controlling FE, reporting, and presentation FEs), the User Entity (3‑D visualisation and control‑panel UI FEs), and a Cross‑System Data Translation FE linking them. Communication inside the DT uses ROS 2; inter‑entity links use Wi‑Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is employed during design (simulation of ACC), development/testing (remote monitoring and debugging), and operation (real‑time monitoring and remote control of the physical vehicle)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured by using high‑resolution LiDAR point clouds and real‑time clustering/tracking algorithms, and by adhering to ISO 15622 ACC specifications. Validity is supported by the 100 ms latency bound, 100 ms clock synchronisation, and safety‑critical design constraints (e.g., emergency braking command)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical‑to‑digital communication uses a Wi‑Fi network (IEEE 802.11) carrying ROS 2 messages; data are serialized and unit‑converted by the Data Translation FE. The same Wi‑Fi link carries command messages from the DT back to the vehicle."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin Entity and User Entity run on external compute platforms (e.g., a desktop or cloud VM) separate from the on‑board Jetson hardware that hosts the Physical Twin Entity. Each Functional Entity is deployed as an independent ROS 2 package."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework) for entity/functional decomposition, ISO 15622 for ACC control logic, ISO/IEC 30173 for digital‑twin terminology, and 3GPP TS 22.185 for latency requirements. Optional OPC UA (IEC 62541) is mentioned for data translation, and ROS 2 provides the middleware implementation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety is addressed by limiting end‑to‑end latency to 100 ms, synchronising clocks within 100 ms, and implementing emergency braking via the DT. No explicit cybersecurity mechanisms (e.g., authentication, encryption) are described in the document."
]
